objective: Persist the successful Overlord Sweep generated graph, wiki, self-learning, Pentagi, and effectiveness baseline artifacts through a pull request that satisfies governance evidence checks.
scope_boundary: Use GitHub issue #487 as the governing issue for generated Overlord Sweep artifact persistence.
Limit write scope to generated graphify outputs, wiki pages, metrics snapshots, the organization compendium, and the evidence files needed for this generated artifact PR.
Preserve the generated content from Overlord Sweep run 24739922689 while supplying the missing plan and execution-scope evidence required by local-ci-gate.
out_of_scope: Changing application source code in governed repositories.
Changing the self-learning algorithm or graph generation logic.
Changing branch protection rules or bypassing required PR checks.
Editing production secrets or GitHub repository settings.
research_summary: Overlord Sweep run 24739922689 completed across the governed repo set and produced a current self-learning report with 147 indexed entries, zero duplicate groups, and zero stale entries. The generated artifact PR was created, but PR #490 used branch automation/overlord-sweep-2026-04-21-24739922689, which does not contain issue-<number>; governance-surface validation therefore could not resolve an issue-specific plan or execution scope. This corrected branch ties the same generated artifact snapshot to issue #487 and includes explicit plan/scope evidence.

sprints.name: Generated artifact persistence
sprints.goal: Make the Overlord Sweep generated artifact PR mergeable under the same governance evidence rules as manual governance-surface changes.
tasks: Create an issue-numbered automation branch from the generated artifact snapshot.
Add a canonical structured agent cycle plan for issue #487.
Add an implementation execution scope that allows only generated artifact paths and this evidence package.
Validate the structured plan and execution scope locally before publishing the corrected generated artifact PR.
acceptance_criteria: The corrected branch name contains issue-487 so governance-surface enforcement can resolve evidence.
The execution scope allows graphify-out, wiki, metrics, docs/ORG_GOVERNANCE_COMPENDIUM.md, and issue #487 evidence files only.
python3 scripts/overlord/validate_structured_agent_cycle_plan.py passes with governance-surface enforcement for the corrected branch.
python3 scripts/overlord/assert_execution_scope.py passes with lane-claim enforcement for the corrected branch.
The corrected generated artifact PR passes local-ci-gate and can replace PR #490.

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm why PR #490 failed and define the minimal governance evidence needed for the generated artifact branch.
specialist_reviews.summary: The artifact content was produced by a successful sweep, but the generated branch lacked an issue number and evidence package. The corrected branch should preserve the generated outputs and add issue #487 plan/scope evidence.

alternate_model_review.summary: This change adds governance evidence for an already generated artifact snapshot and does not alter architecture, model policy, or application behavior.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #487 may publish the Overlord Sweep generated graph/wiki/metric artifacts and the supporting governance evidence needed for a mergeable generated artifact PR.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Validate the corrected branch locally, publish it as the replacement generated artifact PR, wait for required checks, and merge if green.

material_deviation_rules: If local-ci-gate still cannot resolve issue #487 evidence, stop and update the workflow branch naming/evidence generation path before merging generated artifacts.
If generated files outside the declared directories appear, update the execution scope only after confirming they are generated by Overlord Sweep.
If required checks fail for non-evidence reasons, preserve PR #490 as evidence and create a separate issue-backed fix before merging artifacts.
